strengths: Shows understanding of proper loop positioning techniques

weaknesses: This appears to be instructional content rather than a performance attempt

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: 10 repetitions of opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening
drills.targets_weakness: Need to practice actual task execution rather than just demonstration

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause, and verify alignment before cinching
drills.targets_weakness: Focus on completing full task sequences with proper positioning

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your demonstrated understanding into complete task performances. Practice full sequences from loop placement through final positioning to build consistent execution patterns.
